recalls.Description: The 17 Stories Furniture 14-Drawer Dressers are being recalled due to safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These dressers were available in black, white, and brown, featuring 14 fabric drawers and measuring 11.8 inches in length, 37.4 inches in width, and 52.2 inches in height. Each unit is constructed with a metal frame and a wooden top. Model numbers can be found on the product packaging or in your Wayfair account order details.
recalls.Title: Recall of 17 Stories Furniture 14-Drawer Dressers Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please contact Hong Kong Baojia International via email at Baojia_recall@outlook.com.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Wayfair.com from September 2023 to January 2026 for approximately $135.

Importers.Name: Hong Kong Baojia International Limited, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment, potentially leading to serious injuries or death to children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the dressers if not anchored to the wall, keep them out of children's reach, and contact Hong Kong Baojia International for disposal instructions and a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: 17 Stories Furniture recalls 14-drawer dressers due to serious tip-over risks. Contact for refund and disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: LIVEHOM is recalling its 11-Drawer Dressers due to serious safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These fabric dressers, available in various colors including black, white, pink, rustic brown, and charcoal black, measure approximately 11.8 inches long, 39 inches wide, and 46 inches tall. The brand name can be found on the sales receipt for the product.
recalls.Title: Recall of LIVEHOM 11-Drawer Dressers Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Simplehome via email at livehomerecall@163.com.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2025 to January 2026, priced around $110.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Lvmukeji Co., Ltd., dba Simplehome, of China

Hazards.Name: The dressers can tip over if not securely anchored to the wall, leading to potential entrapment and serious injury or death, particularly to children. This product does not meet the mandatory safety standards set by the STURDY Act.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the dressers immediately if they are not anchored to the wall and store them out of children's reach. To obtain a full refund, contact Simplehome. You will need to write 'RECALL' on the dressers with a permanent marker and send a photo of the marked dressers to livehomerecall@163.com before disposing of the product.

recalls.metaDescription: LIVEHOM 11-Drawer Dressers recalled due to serious tip-over hazards. Contact Simplehome for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: SOOWERY is recalling its 6-Drawer Dressers due to serious safety concerns. These dressers, available in black with a metal frame and wooden top, are equipped with six collapsible fabric drawers. They measure 47.2 inches in length, 11.8 inches in width, and 33.3 inches in height, and have been found to be unstable if not properly anchored to a wall, posing significant tip-over and entrapment hazards, especially for children.
recalls.Title: SOOWERY 6-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, email SOOWERY at SOOWERYrecall@outlook.com.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2025 to January 2026 for approximately $130.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Zhongyuantong Technology Co., Ltd., dba SOOWERY of China

Hazards.Name: Unstable if not anchored, posing tip-over and entrapment risks that can lead to serious injuries or death.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use if unanchored, relocate to an inaccessible area for children, mark as 'recalled', and contact SOOWERY for disposal instructions to receive a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: SOOWERY 6-Drawer Dressers pose serious tip-over risks. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: EnHomee is recalling its 10-drawer dressers due to serious safety concerns, including the risk of tip-over and entrapment, particularly for children. These dressers come in black, white, grey, and brown, featuring a metal frame, wooden top, and a combination of collapsible fabric and metal drawers. The dimensions are 38 inches long, 11.8 inches wide, and 48.1 inches tall. The model number '55SCWMSCXLBR' is located in your Amazon order details.
recalls.Title: EnHomee 10-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact EnHomee at 833-668-8899 between 9 a.m. and 5 p.m. PT, Monday to Friday, or email enhomeestore@gmail.com. More information is available at https://enhomee.store/recall.html or by visiting https://enhomee.store/ and clicking 'Recall' at the top.

Manufacturers.Name: Xuzhou Mingquanhe Home Furnishing Co., Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from September 2023 through December 2025 for approximately $115.

Distributors.Name: HunanSan Tang International Trading Co., Ltd. dba EnHomee Direct, of China

Hazards.Name: Unstable dressers can tip over if not anchored, posing serious risks of injury or death to children, violating the STURDY Act.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the dressers if unanchored and move them out of children's reach. Contact EnHomee for guidance on identifying affected units and disposal for a full refund. A photo of the disposed product must be sent to enhomeestore@gmail.com.

recalls.metaDescription: EnHomee recalls 10-drawer dressers due to serious tip-over hazards. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: YITA has issued a recall for several brands of dressers including Dextrus, ModFusion, Uforic, Yintatech, and Yitahome. These 16-drawer dressers, available in gray, black, white, pink, and brown, feature a metal frame and fabric drawers. They measure approximately 37.4 inches in length, 11.8 inches in width, and 57.1 inches in height. SKU numbers FTBFSD-0161, FTBFSD-0162, FTBFSD-0212, FTBFSD-0246, and FTBFSD-0465 can be found on labels on the dresser's top panel and packaging. The brand name is visible in the online listings for these products.
recalls.Title: YITA Recalls Multiple Dresser Brands Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach YITA at 877-672-0878 from 8 a.m. to 12 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at yitamotor@outlook.com. More information is available online at https://www.yitahome.com/article/voluntary-safety-recall-16-drawer-dresser-fabric-dresser.html?aid=152 or by visiting https://www.yitahome.com/ and selecting 'Recall' at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: SKU number "FTBFSD-0161," "FTBFSD-0162," "FTBFSD-0212," "FTBFSD-0246" or "FTBFSD-0465" is printed labels located on the dresser's top panel and on the product packaging of the YITA dressers

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com and Walmart.com from September 2023 to August 2025, priced between $75 and $100.

Importers.Name: Yita LLC, dba Yitahome, Uforic, Dextrus, Yintatech and ModFusion, of Kent, Washington

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment that can lead to serious injuries or fatalities, especially for children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the dressers if they are not wall-anchored, keep them out of children's reach, and contact YITA for a full refund. Mark the dressers with 'RECALL', disassemble them, and send a photo of the disposed item to yitamotor@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: YITA recalls multiple dresser brands due to serious tip-over risks. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety.

recalls.Description: The Fixwal 7-Drawer Dressers have been recalled due to significant safety concerns. These dressers, available in black and white, feature a metal frame, a wooden top, and seven collapsible fabric drawers. They measure 55.1 inches in length, 11.8 inches in width, and 31.5 inches in height. If not securely anchored to the wall, these dressers can pose serious tip-over and entrapment hazards, particularly for children, and do not comply with the safety standards mandated by the STURDY Act.
recalls.Title: Recall of Fixwal 7-Drawer Dressers Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Momok via email at fixwaldresserrecall@outlook.com.

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase online at Amazon.com from September 2023 through December 2025 for approximately $100.

Distributors.Name: Changzhou Xunchuang Home Furnishing Co., Ltd., dba Momok of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment that can lead to serious injury or death, especially to children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the dressers if they are not wall-anchored, keep them out of children's reach, and contact Momok for a full refund. Mark the dressers as 'RECALLED' with a permanent marker, take photos, and email them to fixwaldresserrecall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Fixwal 7-Drawer Dressers recalled due to serious tip-over risks. Contact Momok for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Furnulem has issued a recall for its five-drawer dressers due to serious safety concerns. These wooden dressers, finished in white, stand approximately 31.5 inches tall, 15.75 inches deep, and 50.2 inches wide. They feature a top with recessed power outlets and two round pull knobs on each drawer. This recall specifically affects dressers that do not include feet extensions, identified by the model number "HK-DS-017-CL-5D-1-W" found on the packaging.
recalls.Title: Furnulem 5-Drawer Dressers Recalled for Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers can reach Furnulem at 310-227-9560 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday. Additional support is available via email at support@furnulem.com or online at https://furnulem.com/pages/voluntary-safety-recall. Visit www.furnulem.com and click on the "Recall" section for further details.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com in July 2025 for approximately $140.

Distributors.Name: Shanghai Taiye Furniture Co., Ltd., dba Furnulem, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment due to instability when not anchored to the wall, posing serious injury or death risks to children. This product does not meet the mandatory safety standards set by the STURDY Act.

Remedies.Name: Immediately discontinue use of the dressers if they are not wall-anchored and relocate them out of children's reach. Contact Furnulem for disposal instructions to receive a full refund. A photo showing the disposal of the dresser should be sent to support@furnulem.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Furnulem recalls five-drawer dressers due to serious tip-over risks. Contact for disposal instructions and refunds.

recalls.Description: Shintenchi is recalling its white 6-drawer dressers due to safety concerns. These dressers, featuring six wooden drawers and golden metal feet, measure approximately 15.7 inches deep, 47.2 inches wide, and 30.5 inches high. The model number "SHX12077-WH" can be found embossed on the underside of one of the metal feet and on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: Shintenchi 6-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach out to Shintenchi via email at ShintenchiRecall@hotmail.com or visit their website at http://www.shintenchi.com.cn/recall.html. Alternatively, they can go to http://www.shintenchi.com.cn and click on the "Recall" section at the top of the page.

recalls.Description: Vasicar is recalling its 18-Drawer Dressers due to significant safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These dressers, available in black, white, gray, and mixed colors, feature a metal frame, a wooden top, and 18 collapsible fabric drawers. Each dresser measures approximately 37.8 inches in length, 11.8 inches in width, and 57.1 inches in height. Certain models may have identifiers such as "VR-US18D-Black," "VR-US18D-White," "VR-US18D-Gray," and "VR-US18D-Mixed" on their packaging.

recalls.Description: Rattan is recalling its 6-Drawer Dressers, model YD001, due to significant safety concerns. These dressers, featuring a natural wood finish, woven rattan drawer fronts, and gold handles, measure 43.3 inches by 15.7 inches by 29.5 inches. The model number can be found on the product packaging. If not properly anchored to the wall, these dressers can tip over, posing serious risks of injury or death, especially to children. This recall addresses a violation of the mandatory standards set by the STURDY Act.
recalls.Title: Rattan 6-Drawer Dressers Recalled for Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please email Rattan at FUQARHYrecall@outlook.com.

Manufacturers.Name: Fuzhou Sunrise Creation Corporation Co., Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from September 2025 through November 2025 for approximately $150.

Distributors.Name: Ningbo Honghui E-Commerce Co., Ltd., dba Rattan, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment leading to potential serious injuries or death.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the dressers if they are not wall-anchored, and keep them away from children. Mark the dressers as 'RECALLED' with a permanent marker, take photos, and send them to FUQARHYrecall@outlook.com. Dispose of the product according to local waste guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: Rattan recalls 6-Drawer Dressers due to serious tip-over risks. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description:
17 Stories Furniture is recalling its 18-Drawer Dressers due to serious safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These dressers, available in black, brown, and gray, feature a metal frame, a wooden top, and 18 collapsible fabric drawers. The model identifiers HI1382_13, HI1382_01, or HI1382_09 can be found on the product's outer packaging.

If not properly anchored to a wall, these dressers can become unstable, posing significant risks, particularly to children. This recall is in violation of the mandatory safety standards established by the STURDY Act.
recalls.Title: Recall of 17 Stories Furniture 18-Drawer Dressers Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact 17 Stories Furniture via email at Drawer18Recall@outlook.com.

recalls.Description: Furnulem is recalling its 8-Drawer Dressers due to safety concerns regarding instability when not anchored to a wall. These dressers, available in black, brown, and white, measure approximately 13.8 inches long, 45 inches wide, and 29.7 inches tall. They feature a metal frame, a wooden top with recessed power outlets, and eight collapsible fabric drawers. The model number "DS-0148D003" can be found on the packaging.
recalls.Title: Furnulem 8-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the dressers immediately if they are not secured to a wall. recalls.Description: Cranach Hardware has issued a recall for its plastic tip restraint kits, commonly known as furniture straps, due to potential safety hazards. These kits include two white plastic brackets for securing furniture to the wall, a cable zip tie, screws, and drywall anchors. Over time, the plastic components may weaken or break, increasing the risk of furniture tipping over, which poses a serious danger, particularly to young children and elderly individuals. Testing revealed that these kits do not comply with industry safety standards, heightening the risk of injury.
recalls.Title: Cranach Hardware Recalls Plastic Tip Restraint Kits Due to Safety Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Cranach Hardware at 888-798-9487 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email info@cranach-hardware.com, or visit www.cranach-hardware.com/recalls.html for further details.

Products.Name: Cranach Hardware Plastic Tip Restraint Kits

Images.Caption: Recalled Cranach Hardware Plastic Tip Restraint Kit
Recalled Cranach Hardware Plastic Tip Restraint Kit
Replacement Stainless Steel Tip Restraint Kit

Injuries.Name: CPSC is aware of at least 115 incidents where consumers reported that the defective plastic tip restraint kits broke, including six reported tip-over incidents. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Cranach Hardware, of China

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon since September 2019, priced between $6 and $30 based on package size.

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment due to potential breakage or degradation of the plastic components.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the kits immediately and contact Cranach Hardware for a complimentary replacement kit made of stainless steel. While awaiting the replacement, keep children away from the furniture. To obtain the replacement, consumers must provide photographic proof of the destroyed or disposed product.

recalls.metaDescription: Cranach Hardware recalls plastic tip restraint kits due to safety hazards. Contact for a free stainless steel replacement kit.

recalls.Description:
Lulive is recalling its 12-drawer dressers due to serious safety risks including tip-over and entrapment, which can lead to severe injuries or fatalities, especially among children. The dressers, featuring a metal frame and wooden top, come with 12 fabric drawers of varying sizes, four side pockets, and two hooks. They measure approximately 12 inches by 39 inches by 45 inches and weigh around 30 pounds. The product packaging includes the identifier "KF-X9Y1".

These dressers are deemed unstable unless properly anchored to a wall, violating safety standards established by the STURDY Act. It is critical for consumers to take immediate action if they have one of these dressers that are not secured.
recalls.Title: Lulive 12-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Lulive at 866-610-4348 from 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email lulive12recall@sina.com, or visit www.lulive.com/recalls. More information can also be found by clicking the "Recall" link on the Lulive homepage.

recalls.Description: Modus Furniture is recalling the Kentfield Solid Wood Eight-Drawer Dressers, which were also marketed as the Eliza Dresser, Elyza Dresser, and Westmont Dresser, identified by model number 8ZU582A. These dressers, available in black drifted oak, were produced between October 2023 and August 2024, with production date codes printed on a label located on the back of the units. The dressers pose significant safety hazards if not properly anchored to the wall, creating risks of tip-over and entrapment that could lead to severe injuries or fatalities, particularly for children. This situation breaches the safety standards outlined in the STURDY Act.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from September 2023 to October 2024, priced around $210.

Distributors.Name: YKHallyBee, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment hazards if not anchored to the wall, posing potential injuries or fatalities to children.

Remedies.Name: Immediately stop using the dressers if they are not anchored, move them out of children's reach, mark them as 'recalled' with a permanent marker, and contact YKHallyBee for a full refund. A photo of the disposed dresser must be submitted to yueke113@163.com.

recalls.metaDescription: HallyBee recalls Farmhouse 5-Drawer Dressers due to safety hazards. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety for your children.

recalls.Description:
GIKPAL is recalling its 12-drawer dressers due to safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These dressers, available in rustic brown, black, or white finishes, measure approximately 31 inches wide, 12 inches deep, and 48 inches tall, weighing around 35 lbs. Model numbers HI1437_13, HI1437_14, and HI1437_02 can be found on the product packaging, which also states 'Fabric Dresser' and 'Made in China'.

If not securely anchored to a wall, these dressers can pose serious risks, particularly to children, leading to potential injuries or fatalities. The products do not meet the safety standards outlined in the STURDY Act, which mandates proper performance and labeling for clothing storage units.
recalls.Title: Recall of GIKPAL 12-Drawer Dressers Due to Safety Risks of Tip-Over and Entrapment
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact ONME Direct at 833-449-5777 from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. PT Monday through Friday, and from 1 p.m. to 2 p.m. PT on weekends. Alternatively, reach out via email at Greenservice88@outlook.com or visit https://onmeus.com/pages/recall for more details.

Manufacturers.Name: Shenzhen Leader-Union Technology Co. LTD, of China

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Walmart.com from January 2024 through November 2024 for approximately $91.

Distributors.Name: ONME Direct, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment hazards due to instability if not anchored.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the dressers immediately if they are not anchored, and keep them out of children's reach. Contact ONME Direct for a full refund and provide a photo of the disposed product. ONME Direct and Walmart will reach out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: GIKPAL recalls 12-drawer dressers due to tip-over hazards. Immediate action required for safety. Contact ONME Direct for refunds.

recalls.Description: Global Home USA is recalling its Cedona Natural View six-drawer dressers, model 33117082, due to serious safety concerns. These dressers, measuring approximately 68 inches in length, 18 inches in width, and 36 inches in height, can pose a significant tip-over and entrapment hazard if not properly anchored to the wall. This situation is particularly dangerous for children and does not meet the safety standards outlined in the STURDY Act.
recalls.Title: Global Home USA Recalls Cedona Natural View Six-Drawer Dressers Due to Tip-Over Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should immediately stop using the dresser and contact Rooms To Go at 855-688-0919, available Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET. Alternatively, they can email productcare@roomstogo.com or visit www.cedonadresserrecall.com.

Importers.Name: Global Homes USA, of Charlotte, North Carolina

Hazards.Name: Tip-over and entrapment hazards

Remedies.Name: Free replacement and removal of the recalled dresser

recalls.metaDescription: Global Home USA recalls Cedona Natural View six-drawer dressers due to serious tip-over hazards. Contact Rooms To Go for a free replacement.

recalls.Description:
The recall affects Mill Valley Jr. six-drawer youth dressers available in white and cherry finishes, identified by model numbers C2192Y-N04 and C2193Y-N04. These dressers measure approximately 57.5 inches in length, 18 inches in width, and 35 inches in height, weighing around 132 pounds. Each dresser features a label on the back indicating its model number.

These dressers pose significant safety hazards if not securely anchored to the wall, leading to potential tip-over and entrapment risks that could harm children. This recall also highlights a violation of the STURDY Act's safety standards for clothing storage units.
recalls.Title: Recall of Mill Valley Jr. Six-Drawer Youth Dressers Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Rooms To Go at 855-688-0919, Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, email productcare@roomstogo.com, or visit www.MillValleyJuniorRecall.com.
